summary: Travel journey app where users can create multiple journeys for the same city. Working on travelogue data isolation (Step 3) to ensure each journey's travelogue is fetched and stored by journey ID. Currently executing Sub-step 3a: update travelogue fetch logic to use journeyId.
architectural_notes: Each implementation step must only change the specific logic/UI area targeted — no unrelated layout, panel, or component changes allowed.
Multiple journeys per city are now supported (Step 1 complete); backend allows duplicate city journeys.
Travelogue data must be keyed and isolated by journeyId, not by city name or global key.
known_issues: Step 3 travelogue data isolation hitting repeated internal LLM errors when attempted as a single pass; split into sub-steps 3a/3b/3c.

existing_features.title: Update the travelogue data fetch logic so that travelogue entries are queried and loaded by journeyId rather than by city name or any global/shared key. This change must be confined strictly to the fetch/read path for travelogue data. No other UI layout, panel, component, or styling must be modified.

new_feature_requests.summary: Travelogue data isolation: fetch travelogue by journeyId (Sub-step 3a)
Travelogue data isolation: save travelogue by journeyId (Sub-step 3b)
Travelogue data isolation: delete/clear travelogue by journeyId (Sub-step 3c)
